privileged_info_summary: The task requires an AI agent to create 5 farm logs in the farmOS Field Kit Android app documenting a complete day of pesticide spray operations. All metadata claims are verified: 5 logs are required with specific names, types (Activity, Input, Observation), and done status (4 completed, 1 pending). The pass threshold is 80 points (4 of 5 logs). Technical details in log notes are accurate: EPA Reg No 524-475 is valid for Roundup PRO glyphosate; glyphosate 32 oz/ac + 2,4-D amine 16 oz/ac are realistic pre-plant burndown rates; azoxystrobin + propiconazole at 10.8 fl oz/ac is a real fungicide combination for corn; boom pressure 30 PSI with 0.3 gpm nozzles are standard agricultural spray equipment specifications. The task is classified as 'very_hard' which is appropriate given it requires 40+ UI interactions across multiple log types with detailed text input. All three farmOS log types (Activity, Input, Observation) are authentic. The data is entirely synthetic (test scenario with fictional spray operations).
